title: Constraints on the host galaxy and AGN properties of three z > 6 JWST AGN from NOEMA observations
comment: Submitted to A&A. Main figures: Fig.3 ([CII]-SFR plane), Fig.4 (new SED decomposition). Comments are welcome
summary: We targeted with deep NOEMA observations the [CII]158$μ$m emission of three JWST-discovered AGN at z>6. Two of them have the typical features of Little Red Dots (LRDs), while the third one is a blue, extended, Type I AGN. We do not significantly detect [CII] emission or dust continuum in any of the targets, even after stacking. The resulting [CII] luminosity upper limits, $\log (L_{[CII]}/L_{\odot})<7.77-8.1$, lie $\sim2σ$ below the values expected from the [CII]-SFR relation, and we explore different scenarios to explain the lack of [CII]. We obtained upper limits on the gas masses of $\log (M_{gas}/M_{\odot})<9.26-9.59$ corresponding to $\log( M_{dust}/M_{\odot})<5.68-6.55$ assuming a metallicity dependent dust to gas ratio. Using the continuum non-detections (rms $\sim 16-25 ~μJy$) together with JWST/MIRI constraints, we performed a revised SED-fitting decomposition, resulting in stellar masses up to $\sim 2$ dex lower than previously reported, and implying $0.03\lesssim M_{BH}/M_{*}\lesssim0.7$. For the two LRDs, the SED is well reproduced by stellar emission in the rest-frame UV, while the rising rest-frame optical slope, flattening toward the near-infrared, is consistent with emission from a Type I AGN partially obscured along the polar direction with $E(B-V)_{\rm polar}\simeq 1$, in agreement with attenuation derived from the broad lines Balmer decrement. This decomposition demonstrates that a relatively standard AGN configuration can reproduce the SEDs of the two LRDs, without invoking more exotic scenarios. Finally, we investigate the positions of the three sources in the $IRX-β_{UV}$ plane, finding that they lie in a parameter space where galaxies are typically characterized by patchy dust distributions. Our analysis highlights the importance of millimeter constraints to characterize the different physical properties of high-z AGN.

AI.tldr: 利用NOEMA对三个z>6的JWST发现AGN进行[CII]158μm观测，均未显著探测到[CII]发射或尘埃连续谱，[CII]光度上限低于预期，气体质量上限较低，SED拟合显示恒星质量比先前报告低约2个数量级。
AI.motivation: 研究高红移(z>6)AGN的[CII]发射特性，特别是JWST发现的"小红点"类AGN，探索这些早期宇宙中活动星系核的物理性质、气体含量和尘埃分布特征。
AI.method: 使用NOEMA进行深度[CII]158μm观测，结合JWST/MIRI数据约束，进行SED拟合分解，分析[CII]光度上限、气体质量上限、尘埃质量上限，并研究IRX-βUV平面上的位置。
AI.result: 未显著探测到[CII]发射或尘埃连续谱，[CII]光度上限低于[CII]-SFR关系预期值约2σ，气体质量上限较低，SED拟合显示恒星质量比先前报告低约2个数量级，黑洞质量与恒星质量比在0.03-0.7之间。
AI.conclusion: 两个"小红点"AGN的SED可以用标准AGN配置解释，无需更奇特场景；三个源在IRX-βUV平面上位于尘埃分布斑驳的区域；毫米波约束对表征高红移AGN物理性质至关重要。

title: The Evolution of the Spin Alignments of Dark Matter Halos in the Cosmic Web
comment: 12 pages, 9 figures, submitted to Astronomy and Astrophysics
summary: We investigate the evolution of dark matter halo spin alignments with respect to cosmic filaments, exploring how halo mass, proximity to filaments, and major mergers influence their orientation over time. We perform a suite of dark matter-only zoom-in N-body simulations centered on ten filaments extracted from a cosmological box using the 1DREAM structure finder. This approach allows us to resolve low-mass halos within filaments while preserving the large-scale environment. Halos are identified with the Amiga Halo Finder (AHF), and their evolutionary histories are reconstructed to trace the spin, shape, and distance to the filament from redshift $z = 1$ to $z = 0$. We confirm a strong mass-dependent alignment signal: low-mass halos tend to align parallel to the filament, while high-mass halos preferentially exhibit perpendicular orientations, despite limited statistics. Perpendicular alignments become dominant at the highest halo masses in our sample, around $\log_{10}(M_\mathrm{h}/h^{-1}\mathrm{M_\odot}) \sim 12$. We also find that major mergers can induce sharp spin reorientations and temporary transitions toward more prolate halo shapes, particularly in massive halos located near the filament core, suggesting a preferential merger direction within filaments. Overall, halo mass emerges as the primary factor governing spin-filament alignments in our sample. By analyzing the global evolution, we find that the average orientations at z = 0 do not differ significantly from those at $z = 1$, indicating that the present-day spin configuration is largely established at earlier stages of halo evolution. Major mergers, although relatively rare, represent one of the few mechanisms capable of disrupting this initial alignment.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过N体模拟分析了暗物质晕自旋与宇宙纤维结构的对齐演化，发现低质量晕倾向于平行于纤维，高质量晕则垂直于纤维，且主要合并事件能显著改变自旋方向。
AI.motivation: 研究暗物质晕自旋与宇宙纤维结构的对齐关系，探索晕质量、与纤维的距离以及主要合并事件如何影响这种对齐关系随时间的变化。
AI.method: 使用1DREAM结构查找器从宇宙学盒子中提取十个纤维，进行暗物质N体zoom-in模拟；用Amiga Halo Finder (AHF)识别晕，重建从z=1到z=0的演化历史，追踪自旋、形状和与纤维的距离。
AI.result: 发现强烈的质量依赖对齐信号：低质量晕倾向于平行于纤维，高质量晕倾向于垂直于纤维（在log10(Mh/h⁻¹M⊙)~12时最明显）；主要合并能引起急剧的自旋重定向和暂时的更扁长形状；z=0的平均方向与z=1无显著差异，表明当前自旋构型在早期已基本确立。
AI.conclusion: 晕质量是控制自旋-纤维对齐的主要因素；当前的自旋构型在早期演化阶段已基本确立；主要合并虽然相对罕见，但能破坏这种初始对齐。

title: Pervasive Cavity-Ring Structure for Star Formation in Dwarf Irregular Galaxies
comment: 31 pages, 18 figures, accepted by The Astrophysical Journal
summary: Unsharp-mask images of HI emission from 36 dwarf irregular (dIrr) galaxies illustrate star formation in dispersed clouds and on the rims of large cavities. The cavities can extend for a radial scalelength and typically have circular or slightly sheared forms. The average surface density of cloud peaks is ~20 Msun/pc2, and, combined with their average FUV star formation rate, suggests a gas consumption time of ~3.2 Gyr. Vertical hydrostatic equilibrium calculations for 24 of these dIrrs give a typical scale height of ~400 pc, which combines with the gas and star formation surface densities to suggest an efficiency per free fall time of ~1%. These values are comparable to those in the molecular clouds of spiral galaxies, suggesting the primary difference between clouds is the presence of CO at higher metallicity in the spirals. U-B color images of the dIrrs suggest that cavity ages range between 10^7 and 10^8 years, with the longer times explaining the common lack of bright OB associations in their centers and their low expansion speeds. Most are circular because the shear time exceeds 100 Myr, although some of the HI has spiral structure. These observations suggests that star formation in dIrrs proceeds slowly in a sequential fashion in dispersed clouds and on the periphery of giant cavities that move and expand during the ~50 Myr supernova era of the previous generation. In contrast, spiral galaxies have shear times 10 times shorter and more important stellar dynamics that compresses the gas into filaments.

AI.tldr: 矮不规则星系中恒星形成的研究：通过HI发射图像分析，发现恒星形成主要发生在分散的云团和大型空洞边缘，气体消耗时间约32亿年，自由落体时间效率约1%，与螺旋星系分子云相似
AI.motivation: 研究矮不规则星系中恒星形成的机制和特点，特别是通过HI发射图像分析恒星形成的位置、效率以及与螺旋星系的差异
AI.method: 使用非锐化掩模技术处理36个矮不规则星系的HI发射图像，分析恒星形成区域的空间分布；对其中24个星系进行垂直流体静力学平衡计算，确定尺度高度；结合U-B颜色图像估计空洞年龄
AI.result: 发现恒星形成主要发生在分散的云团（平均表面密度约20太阳质量/平方秒差距）和大型空洞边缘；气体消耗时间约3.2吉年；典型尺度高度约400秒差距；自由落体时间效率约1%；空洞年龄在10^7-10^8年之间；剪切时间超过100兆年
AI.conclusion: 矮不规则星系中的恒星形成以缓慢、顺序的方式在分散云团和巨型空洞边缘进行，与螺旋星系的主要差异在于高金属丰度下存在CO分子，而非恒星形成效率本身

title: An inverted infall profile for the collapse of the massive star-forming IRDC SDC335.579-0.292
comment: 19 pages, 22 figures, accepted for publication in Monthly Notices of the Royal Astronomical Society
summary: There is increasing evidence for global collapse of clumps over parsec-scales in massive star formation regions. Such collapse may result in characteristic molecular line emission profiles but the spatial variation of such lines has rarely been quantitatively examined. Here we explore the infall properties using the spatially-resolved HCO$^+$ J=1--0 and H$^{13}$CO$^+$ J=1--0 maps of the massive infrared dark cloud (IRDC) SDC335.579-0.292. We compare the observations with the analytical Hill5 model and radiative transfer models. This shows that the best-fit infall velocity towards the cloud centre to be well-constrained to $-0.6$ to $-1.6$ km s$^{-1}$ and the mass infall rate between a few $\times10^{-3}$ and $10^{-2}$ M$_{\odot}$yr$^{-1}$. The comparison also highlights some limitations of the Hill5 method. We demonstrate that the width of optically thin spectral lines, which are usually interpreted as resulting from turbulent motions, are in fact dominated by unresolved, ordered infall motions within the beam. Our results suggest a complex collapse situation where there is a minimum in the infall velocity at $\sim2\times10^{18}$ cm (0.7 pc) with the infall velocity increasing at both smaller and larger radii. The parsec-scale infall with an inverted velocity profile indicates that the accretion in this massive star-forming cloud should have intermediate scales, at which fragmentation or filament formation has to occur before material flows onto the cloud centre.

AI.tldr: 研究通过HCO⁺和H¹³CO⁺谱线观测分析大质量红外暗云SDC335.579-0.292的坍缩特性，发现存在特征性速度分布，揭示湍动谱线宽度主要由未分辨的坍缩运动主导。
AI.motivation: 已有证据表明大质量恒星形成区存在秒差距尺度的整体坍缩，这种坍缩会产生特征分子谱线发射轮廓，但这类谱线的空间变化很少被定量研究。本研究旨在通过空间分辨观测探索大质量红外暗云SDC335.579-0.292的坍缩特性。
AI.method: 使用HCO⁺ J=1-0和H¹³CO⁺ J=1-0的空间分辨谱线图，结合Hill5解析模型和辐射转移模型进行对比分析，约束坍缩速度和质量吸积率。
AI.result: 最佳拟合的云中心坍缩速度在-0.6到-1.6 km s⁻¹之间，质量吸积率在几×10⁻³到10⁻² M⊙ yr⁻¹之间。研究发现通常被解释为湍动运动的薄光学谱线宽度实际上主要由光束内未分辨的有序坍缩运动主导。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了复杂的坍缩情景：在~2×10¹⁸ cm（0.7 pc）处存在坍缩速度最小值，在更小和更大半径处速度增加。这种具有反转速度分布的秒差距尺度坍缩表明，大质量恒星形成云的吸积应具有中间尺度，在此尺度上物质在流向云中心之前会发生碎裂或纤维结构形成。

title: Optical spectroscopy of high redshift BL Lac objects
comment: 26 pages, 21 figures, 5 tables in press in A&A
summary: BL Lac objects (BLL) are defined by the presence of very weak (typically $<$ 5 Å) or even absent spectral lines. This makes determining their distance particularly challenging, especially at high redshift, where the sources are fainter and the host galaxy contribution in the optical band becomes negligible. Yet measuring their distance is crucial for deriving and modelling their luminosity, notably in the gamma-ray band, where BLLs dominate the extragalactic sky. In this work, we re-examine the reported high-redshift (z $>$ 0.6) BLL, many of which are commonly cited in the literature despite appearing questionable. We present new spectra for 52 objects obtained with the 10.4 m GTC. For 16 of them we propose a new redshift, or provide a spectroscopic lower limit, while for 14 sources we confirm previously published values. In 22 cases the spectra remain featureless, even with high S/N observations. These objects are likely to lie at 0.3 $<$ z $<$ 1.4 : the lack of host-galaxy features sets a lower limit to their distance, while the absence of intervening absorption systems argues against substantially higher redshifts. We compare our findings with the previous robustly established cases of BLLs at z $>$ 0.6 that meet our selection criteria.

AI.tldr: 重新审视高红移BL Lac天体的红移测量，通过GTC望远镜获得52个天体的新光谱，为16个天体提出新红移或下限，确认14个已发表值，22个仍无特征谱线
AI.motivation: BL Lac天体光谱线极弱或缺失，导致距离测量困难，尤其在高红移时更暗且宿主星系贡献可忽略。但距离测量对推导和建模其光度（特别是在伽马射线波段）至关重要，而BLLs在河外伽马射线天空占主导地位
AI.method: 使用10.4米GTC望远镜获得52个高红移（z>0.6）BL Lac天体的新光谱，重新检验文献中常引用但可能存疑的红移测量
AI.result: 为16个天体提出新红移或提供光谱下限，确认14个已发表红移值，22个天体光谱仍无特征。无特征天体可能位于0.3<z<1.4范围：缺乏宿主星系特征设定了距离下限，而缺乏介入吸收系统排除了更高红移
AI.conclusion: 通过与先前稳健建立的高红移BL Lac案例比较，重新评估了这些天体的红移测量，为理解这类难以观测天体的距离提供了新数据

title: A multi-scale molecular and atomic gas view on the HII region N113 in the Large Magellanic Cloud:Evidence for high-mass star formation triggered by supersonically-colliding HI flows
summary: The Large Magellanic Cloud (LMC) exhibits vigorous high-mass star formation, including the HII regions 30~Dor that is the most active site of star formation in the local group. The present paper focuses on the Giant Molecular Cloud (GMC) in the HII region N113 in the central part of the LMC. Based on the $^{12}$CO($J$ =1-0) and $^{13}$CO($J$ = 1-0) data at a resolution of approximately 0.2 pc taken with ALMA+APEX, we reveal that the GMC consists of two filamentary structures each of approximately 10 pc in length, forming a V-shape pattern with a vertex angle of 90 degrees. The filamentary structures host high-mass young stellar objects in gravitationally bound dense gas. Large-scale HI gas data covering 100 pc reveal two distinct velocity components separated by more than 40 km s$^{-1}$, that correspond to the low velocity (L-) and disk (D-) HI components of the LMC. The L-component appears to be located in a cavity-like distribution of the D-component, and the CO filaments are positioned at the cavity's edge. We find evidence for the L-component to fit the cavity by a 53 pc displacement, and suggest that collisional compression of the HI gas during the last 1.3 Myr triggered the GMC formation and the high-mass star formation. This lends support for the large scale collision driven by the tidal interaction is playing a role in evolution of interstellar medium in N113.

AI.tldr: 基于ALMA+APEX高分辨率观测，研究LMC中N113 HII区的巨分子云，发现其由两个10 pc长的丝状结构组成V形，包含大质量年轻恒星体，并揭示HI气体碰撞压缩触发了GMC形成和大质量恒星形成。
AI.motivation: 研究大麦哲伦云中活跃的恒星形成区域，特别是N113 HII区的巨分子云，以理解大质量恒星形成的触发机制和星际介质演化过程。
AI.method: 使用ALMA+APEX望远镜获取高分辨率（约0.2 pc）的12CO(J=1-0)和13CO(J=1-0)数据，结合覆盖100 pc尺度的大范围HI气体数据，分析分子云结构和气体动力学特征。
AI.result: 发现GMC由两个约10 pc长的丝状结构组成V形（顶点角90度），包含引力束缚的致密气体和大质量年轻恒星体；HI气体显示两个速度分量（L-和D-分量）分离超过40 km/s，CO丝状结构位于D-分量空腔边缘；L-分量通过53 pc位移填充空腔，表明过去1.3 Myr内HI气体碰撞压缩触发了GMC形成。
AI.conclusion: HI气体的大尺度碰撞压缩是N113区域巨分子云形成和大质量恒星形成的主要触发机制，支持潮汐相互作用驱动的大尺度碰撞在星际介质演化中起重要作用。

title: PAC in DESI. II. Galaxy-halo connection into the $10^{6}{\rm M}_{\odot}$ frontier
comment: 35 pages, 32+10 figures. Main results in Figure 28, 30 and 32. Submitted to MNRAS
summary: Understanding dwarf galaxy formation is crucial for testing dark matter models and reionization physics. However, constructing stellar-mass complete spectroscopic samples at low masses is increasingly difficult, and the potential existence of a local void complicates studies in an average environment. The Photometric object Around Cosmic webs (PAC) method, which combines deep photometric and spectroscopic data to measure the excess surface density $\bar{n}_2w_{\rm{p}}(r_{\rm{p}})$ of photometric objects around spectroscopic tracers, offers a promising path forward. We model 349 $\bar{n}_2w_{\rm{p}}(r_{\rm{p}})$ measurements from DESI Y1 BGS and DECaLS, reaching $M_*=10^{6.4}\,{\rm M}_{\odot}$, using a stellar mass-halo mass relation (SHMR)-based subhalo abundance matching framework applied to two high-resolution $N$-body simulations from the Jiutian suite. The resulting SHMR is constrained down to $M_{\rm h}\simeq10^{8.0}\,h^{-1}{\rm M}_{\odot}$, revealing a clear upturn at $\sim10^{10.0}\,h^{-1}{\rm M}_{\odot}$ toward lower masses, indicating rising star-formation efficiency (SFE) in small haloes. This feature persists under extensions of the model that allow mass-dependent scatter, reionization-induced suppression of the halo occupation fraction, galaxy assembly bias, and alternative cosmologies. Together with the finding from Paper I, we find that central red galaxies dominate the low-mass regime. Our results motivate a hypothesis in which SFE is significantly higher than previously thought prior to reionization, enabling relatively massive galaxies to form in small haloes. These systems are subsequently quenched by the UV background, producing the central red dwarf galaxies observed. Finally, we obtain $3σ$ and $5σ$ upper mass bounds of $10^{8.38}\,h^{-1}{\rm M}_{\odot}$ and $10^{8.71}\,h^{-1}{\rm M}_{\odot}$ on the smallest haloes required to exist by the data.

AI.tldr: 该研究利用PAC方法结合DESI Y1 BGS和DECaLS数据，通过SHMR框架分析矮星系形成，发现小质量暗晕中恒星形成效率上升，并提出了再电离前高效恒星形成、随后被UV背景淬灭的矮星系形成机制。
AI.motivation: 理解矮星系形成对测试暗物质模型和再电离物理至关重要，但构建低质量恒星完整光谱样本困难，且局部空洞存在使平均环境研究复杂化。
AI.method: 使用PAC方法结合深场测光和光谱数据，测量光度天体在光谱示踪物周围的过剩面密度；基于SHMR的子晕丰度匹配框架分析349个测量值，应用于Jiutian套件的高分辨率N体模拟。
AI.result: SHMR约束到暗晕质量约10^8.0 h^{-1} M_⊙，在~10^10.0 h^{-1} M_⊙处出现明显上翘，表明小质量暗晕中恒星形成效率上升；该特征在各种模型扩展下保持稳定；中心红星系主导低质量区域。
AI.conclusion: 提出再电离前恒星形成效率显著高于先前预期的假设，使相对大质量星系能在小暗晕中形成，随后被UV背景淬灭形成观测到的中心红矮星系；获得暗晕存在的最小质量上限约束。

title: Ripples of Stellar Enrichment (RoSE) -- simulating element production and mixing in the Milky Way star-by-star
summary: We present the Ripples of Stellar Enrichment (RoSE) simulations, which follow a Milky Way-like isolated disc galaxy with star-by-star feedback and nucleosynthesis from all significant channels -- Wolf-Rayet stars, type II supernovae, type Ia supernovae, asymptotic giant branch stars, and neutron star mergers. We use these simulations to test how elements' diverse nucleosynthetic origins imprint spatial, temporal, and inter-element abundance correlations in gas and stars. We find that nucleosynthetic source composition is the primary organising principle of elemental structure: elements sharing a dominant production channel exhibit similar spatial statistics and temporal statistics and their abundances are strongly correlated with one another, while mixed-source pairs are much more weakly correlated. We show that a simple linear regression model based only on how element pairs differ in their nucleosynthetic origin is able to predict, with high fidelity, how strongly their abundances correlate, in both interstellar medium gas and coeval stars. Comparison with Milky Way stellar abundance data shows encouraging qualitative agreement, with differences between simulations and observations comparable to the scatter between independent observational datasets. These results provide first-principles that support for a source-driven framework of galactic chemical structure and connect analytic theory, simulations, and stellar abundance observations.

AI.tldr: RoSE模拟追踪银河系类似星系中恒星反馈和核合成过程，发现元素核合成来源是元素丰度相关性的主要决定因素，相同来源元素丰度高度相关，混合来源元素相关性较弱。
AI.motivation: 研究不同核合成来源（沃尔夫-拉叶星、II型超新星、Ia型超新星、渐近巨星支星、中子星并合）如何影响气体和恒星中元素的空间分布、时间演化和丰度相关性。
AI.method: 使用RoSE模拟追踪孤立盘状星系中恒星逐星反馈和核合成过程，分析不同来源元素的空间统计、时间统计和丰度相关性，并建立基于核合成来源差异的线性回归模型预测丰度相关性。
AI.result: 核合成来源组成是元素结构的主要组织原则：共享主要生产通道的元素具有相似的空间和时间统计特征，丰度高度相关；混合来源元素对相关性较弱。线性回归模型能准确预测丰度相关性，与银河系观测数据定性一致。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果为源驱动的星系化学结构框架提供了基本原理支持，连接了分析理论、模拟和恒星丰度观测，表明核合成来源是理解星系化学演化的关键因素。
